creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

If the old ata(4) stack was still being used, this would be a good patch. 

Since these features are now implemented in the new CAM enabled ata world, 
this patchset is redundant.  If this doesn't work for you, please let us 
know on freebsd-scsi.
